summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GoSolo Admin Product Management features. All backend APIs (22/22 tests passed) and frontend UI flows working correctly. Features tested: Admin Products page, Add/Edit/Delete products, Quick stock +/- buttons, Discount badges on Shop page, Strikethrough prices, Product detail page discounts, Admin dropdown navigation.
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Good validation on API endpoints (price, stock, discount range)
Soft delete implemented for products with orders - good data integrity
Discount calculation correctly shows strikethrough prices and savings
Admin dropdown properly navigates to Products and Orders pages
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_UI_Product during UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Product Management fully tested. Features working: Add/Edit/Delete products, Quick stock +/- buttons, Discount percentages (0-100), isActive toggle, Soft delete for products with orders. Shop page shows discount badges (20% OFF, 15% OFF), strikethrough prices, and savings amount. Product detail page shows discount badge, original price strikethrough, discounted price, and savings. Admin dropdown in navbar navigates to /admin/products and /admin/orders.

backend_apis: GET /api/admin/products - Returns all products including inactive with order counts
POST /api/admin/products - Creates new product with validation
PATCH /api/admin/products/[id] - Updates product fields (name, price, stock, discount, isActive)
DELETE /api/admin/products/[id] - Soft delete for products with orders, hard delete otherwise
GET /api/products - Public shop API returns only active products with stock > 0
frontend_pages: /admin/products - Admin product management with stats, table, add/edit/delete
/shop - Shop page with discount badges, strikethrough prices, savings display
/product/[id] - Product detail with discount badge, price breakdown, stock status
ui_interactions: Add Product modal - all form fields working
Edit Product modal - pre-filled with existing data
Quick stock +/- buttons - instant stock updates
Delete product - confirmation dialog, success message
Admin dropdown - navigates to Products and Orders pages
